feed.title: SkillsLLM

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, Claude Skills Hub, OpenRouter, LiteLLM (blog + releases), and Glama MCP Servers

entry.title: July Townhall: Product + Roadmap Updates
entry.content: Join the LiteLLM July townhall on Thursday, 23 July at 7:30 AM PT to learn about LiteLLM's product updates and roadmap.

entry.title: bmal-skills
entry.content: bmal-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: pro-workflow
entry.content: Complete AI coding workflow system. Orchestration patterns, 18 hook events, 5 agents, 7 reference guides, cross-agent support, and searchable learnings.

entry.title: claude-resources
entry.content: geckotang's fork of Claude Code resources: skills, commands, agents, hooks, and scripts.

entry.title: agent-skills
entry.content: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents — covering the full software development lifecycle from spec to ship.

entry.title: clone-design
entry.content: A measurement-grade website-cloning system. Reverse-engineer any site — its animations, layered depth, exact typography, spacing, and behavior — and rebuild it so faithfully that flipping between the two is hard. Measures what most guides guess, and proves fidelity with a pixel-diff gate instead of asserting it.

entry.title: korean-law
entry.content: 법제처 42개 API → 9개 통합 도구. 법령·판례·행정규칙·자치법규·조약·해석례 + LLM 환각 방지 인용 검증 + 조문 영향 그래프 + 시점 비교 자동 diff + 판례 생사 확인(Citator) + 행위시법 판단 + 이럴 땐 이렇게 5단계 안내

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,489 supported skills.

entry.title: superpowers-ruby
entry.content: Ruby/Rails skills library for Claude Code: TDD with Minitest, Rails patterns, Hotwire, Brakeman, Sandi Metz rules, 37signals style, and proven development workflows based on Jesse Vincent's superpowers

entry.title: agashic-funnel-architect
entry.content: Turn Claude into a full-stack sales funnel architect. Build high-converting funnels with optimized UI/UX, page speed, mobile responsiveness, and deploy to any platform.

entry.title: claude-handoff
entry.content: End-of-session continuity tools. Writes HANDOFF.md (task snapshot for the next agent) and CHANGELOG.md (permanent project history). Use /claude-handoff:wrap-up to write both at once, or run each independently.

entry.title: html-slides
entry.content: Generate or convert single-file HTML slide presentations with interactive components (flip cards, charts, tables, code blocks, stats, architecture flows, and more) or creative visual themes.

entry.title: claude-code-settings
entry.content: Claude Code settings and skills for spec-driven development workflows

entry.title: beads
entry.content: AI-supervised issue tracker for coding workflows. Manage tasks, discover work, and maintain context with simple CLI commands.

entry.title: antigravity-skills
entry.content: Professional Agent Skills collection for full-stack development, logic planning, and multimedia processing.

entry.title: mcp-trino
entry.content: A high-performance MCP server for Trino distributed SQL query engine

entry.title: nature-skills
entry.content: A growing collection of Claude skills for producing academic work at Nature-journal standard. Covers scientific figures (nature-figure), manuscript prose polishing (nature-polishing), citation retrieval and export (nature-citation), data availability statements and FAIR metadata (nature-data), and paper-to-PPTX presentation conversion (nature-paper2ppt). Future releases planned: statistical reporting, peer-review responses, methods writing, cover letters, and review articles. All rules derived from primary sources — published Nature papers, journal author guidelines, and structured writing curricula.

entry.title: assette
entry.content: Assette Implementation — Node.js MCP shim + the plugin-config skill. The five authoring skills (PowerPoint + Excel smart-page fabricators, block author, data-object author, content classification) are delivered by the hosted server after sign-in via 'initialize assette' / 'update assette'.

entry.title: pua
entry.content: PUA Debugging Motivator -- forces Claude Code to exhaust all solutions before giving up, using corporate PUA rhetoric from Chinese tech giants (Alibaba, ByteDance, Huawei, Tencent). Turns 'I cannot solve this' into systematic debugging with escalating pressure levels.

entry.title: cook
entry.content: Claude Code の強力なコマンド・ロール集（日本語版）

entry.title: alexrebula-skills
entry.content: A fork of mattpocock/skills extended with framework scaffolding, git/PR lifecycle tools, LittleBranches org skills, and daily productivity workflows.

entry.title: yamp
entry.content: Personal meal planner — meal planning, pantry, recipes, and Kroger cart. Bundles the workflow skills and the yamp connector.

entry.title: cook-zh-cn
entry.content: Claude Code 强大的命令和角色集合（简体中文）

entry.title: cook-en
entry.content: Powerful commands and roles collection for Claude Code (English)

entry.title: dx
entry.content: Developer experience essentials: GitHub Actions debugging, conversation cloning, context handoffs, and Reddit research via Gemini CLI

entry.content: Claude Code 強大的命令和角色集合（繁體中文）

entry.content: Collection puissante de commandes et de rôles pour Claude Code (Français)

entry.title: cook-es
entry.content: Potente colección de comandos y roles para Claude Code (Español)

entry.title: cook-pt
entry.content: Poderosa coleção de comandos e papéis para Claude Code (Português)

entry.title: last30days
entry.content: Research any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Hacker News, Polymarket, GitHub, and 5+ more sources. AI agent scores by upvotes, likes, and real money - not editors.

entry.title: cook-ko
entry.content: Claude Code를 위한 강력한 명령어 및 역할 모음 (한국어)

entry.title: minimax-skills
entry.content: MiniMax AI skills library: frontend development, fullstack development, and Android native development

entry.title: android-adb-skill
entry.content: Android device automation via ADB — screenshots, UI inspection, gestures, app management, and debugging

entry.title: ecc
entry.content: Battle-tested Claude Code plugin for engineering teams — 60 agents, 230 skills, 75 legacy command shims, production-ready hooks, and selective install workflows evolved through continuous real-world use

entry.title: fullstack-dev-skills
entry.content: Comprehensive skill pack with 66 specialized skills for full-stack developers: 12 language experts (Python, TypeScript, Go, Rust, C++, Swift, Kotlin, C#, PHP, Java, SQL, JavaScript), 10 backend frameworks, 6 frontend/mobile, plus infrastructure, DevOps, security, and testing. Features progressive disclosure architecture for 50% faster loading.

entry.title: fable-5
entry.content: Fable 5's working loop for hard tasks: decompose by verification boundaries, verify against the world, choose next by plan-change. Includes scout + refuter agents and a preflight script.

entry.title: everything-claude-code
entry.content: Complete collection of battle-tested Claude Code configs from an Anthropic hackathon winner - agents, skills, hooks, commands, and rules evolved over 10+ months of intensive daily use

entry.title: shiny-maui-shell
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for Shiny MAUI Shell - enhanced .NET MAUI Shell navigation with ViewModel lifecycle management, source generation, and strong-typed navigation

entry.title: last30days
entry.content: Research any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Hacker News, Polymarket, GitHub, and 5+ more sources. AI agent scores by upvotes, likes, and real money - not editors.

entry.title: cc-search-chats
entry.content: Context recovery and cross-referencing for Claude Code chat history — recover from compression, search sessions, extract conversations

entry.title: cupertino
entry.content: Search and read Apple developer documentation offline, including SwiftUI, UIKit, Foundation, and 300+ frameworks.

entry.title: ui-ux-pro-max
entry.content: UI/UX design intelligence. 67 styles, 96 palettes, 57 font pairings, 25 charts, 13 stacks (React, Next.js, Vue, Svelte, Astro, SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, Nuxt, Jetpack Compose). Actions: plan, build, create, design, implement, review, fix, improve, optimize, enhance, refactor, check UI/UX code. Projects: website, landing page, dashboard, admin panel, e-commerce, SaaS, portfolio, blog, mobile app. Elements: button, modal, navbar, sidebar, card, table, form, chart. Styles: glassmorphism, claymorphism, minimalism, brutalism, neumorphism, bento grid, dark mode, responsive, skeuomorphism, flat design. Topics: color palette, accessibility, animation, layout, typography, font pairing, spacing, hover, shadow, gradient.

entry.title: mempalace
entry.content: Give your AI a memory — mine projects and conversations into a searchable palace. 19 MCP tools, auto-save hooks, and guided setup.

entry.title: workmux-status
entry.content: Display Claude agent status in tmux window names via workmux

entry.title: hyperframes
entry.content: HyperFrames by HeyGen. Write HTML, render video. Compositions, GSAP and runtime adapter animations, captions, voiceovers, audio-reactive visuals, and website-to-video capture for HyperFrames.

entry.title: watch
entry.content: Let Claude watch a video. Downloads with yt-dlp, extracts auto-scaled frames with ffmpeg, pulls captions or falls back to Whisper, and hands frames + transcript to Claude so it can answer questions about the video.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,415 supported skills.

entry.title: aiup-alfresco
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for Alfresco/Hyland extension development — slash commands, skills, and agents.

entry.title: pup
entry.content: Datadog API CLI with 49 command groups, 300+ subcommands. Skills and domain agents for monitoring, logs, APM, security, and infrastructure.

entry.title: cli-printing-press
entry.content: Generate production Go CLIs from API descriptions or OpenAPI specs

entry.title: copilotkit
entry.content: AI agent skills for CopilotKit — setup, develop, integrate, debug, upgrade, and contribute to CopilotKit projects

entry.title: nlpm
entry.content: Natural-Language Programming Manager — score, check, fix, and test NL artifacts across Claude Code, Codex CLI, and Antigravity. Tier-aware scoring with per-tool overlays.

entry.title: ponytail
entry.content: Lazy senior dev mode. Forces the simplest, shortest solution that actually works — YAGNI, stdlib first, no unrequested abstractions.

entry.title: cellar
entry.content: Look up the public API of any JVM dependency (Scala 3, Scala 2, Java) from the terminal

entry.title: context-mode
entry.content: Claude Code MCP plugin that saves 98% of your context window. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and intent-driven search.

entry.title: beads
entry.content: AI-supervised issue tracker for coding workflows. Manage tasks, discover work, and maintain context with simple CLI commands.

entry.title: v1.93.0-rc.2
entry.content:
Verify Docker Image Signature

All LiteLLM Docker images are signed with cosign. Every release is signed with the same key introduced in commit 0112e53.

Verify using the pinned commit hash (recommended):

A commit hash is cryptographically immutable, so this is the strongest way to ensure you are using the original signing key:

cosign verify \
  --key https://raw.githubusercontent.com/BerriAI/litellm/0112e53046018d726492c814b3644b7d376029d0/cosign.pub \
  ghcr.io/berriai/litellm:v1.93.0-rc.2

Verify using the release tag (convenience):

Tags are protected in this repository and resolve to the same key. This option is easier to read but relies on tag protection rules:

cosign verify \
  --key https://raw.githubusercontent.com/BerriAI/litellm/v1.93.0-rc.2/cosign.pub \
  ghcr.io/berriai/litellm:v1.93.0-rc.2

Expected output:

The following checks were performed on each of these signatures:
  - The cosign claims were validated
  - The signatures were verified against the specified public key

What's Changed

  • chore(release): backport #32956 onto patch-1.93.0rc1 for the 1.93.0 rc2 cut by @yuneng-berri in #33499

Full Changelog: v1.93.0-rc.1...v1.93.0-rc.2

entry.title: v1.94.0-dev.2
entry.content:
Verify Docker Image Signature

All LiteLLM Docker images are signed with cosign. Every release is signed with the same key introduced in commit 0112e53.

Verify using the pinned commit hash (recommended):

A commit hash is cryptographically immutable, so this is the strongest way to ensure you are using the original signing key:

cosign verify \
  --key https://raw.githubusercontent.com/BerriAI/litellm/0112e53046018d726492c814b3644b7d376029d0/cosign.pub \
  ghcr.io/berriai/litellm:v1.94.0-dev.2

Verify using the release tag (convenience):

Tags are protected in this repository and resolve to the same key. This option is easier to read but relies on tag protection rules:

cosign verify \
  --key https://raw.githubusercontent.com/BerriAI/litellm/v1.94.0-dev.2/cosign.pub \
  ghcr.io/berriai/litellm:v1.94.0-dev.2

Expected output:

The following checks were performed on each of these signatures:
  - The cosign claims were validated
  - The signatures were verified against the specified public key

What's Changed

  • fix(proxy): route master key to team-scoped models by @kunal2002 in #32926
  • fix(bedrock_mantle): route xai.grok-4.3 via /openai/v1 frontier path by @marty-sullivan in #33027
  • feat(guardrails): streaming text transformation in generic_guardrail_api by @yucheng-berri in #33110
  • test(e2e): cover model-aware mid-conversation system handling on Bedrock Invoke /v1/messages by @mateo-berri in #32963
  • test(claude_code): move the Claude Code compatibility matrix under tests/e2e by @devin-ai-integration[bot] in #32548
  • chore(ci): sync litellm_internal_staging into daily OSS branch by @yuneng-berri in #33337
  • feat(bedrock guardrails): add resource-less InvokeGuardrailChecks (detect-only) mode by @yucheng-berri in #33299
  • Revert "chore(ci): sync litellm_internal_staging into daily OSS branch" by @yuneng-berri in #33339
  • fix(websearch): intercept web search on the Responses API by @devin-ai-integration[bot] in #33129
  • fix(anthropic-adapter): drop empty content_block_delta events by @mateo-berri in #33315
  • fix(mcp): persist discovered OAuth endpoints and keep last known good on failed re-discovery by @tin-berri in #33286
  • test(e2e): otel trace completeness on streaming chat, messages, and responses (LIT-3787) by @yucheng-berri in #33234
  • feat(router): resolve auto-router routing plugins from proxy YAML config by @krrish-berri-2 in #33251
  • test(e2e): failed request error span carries the full untruncated message and status (LIT-4179) by @yucheng-berri in #33304
  • refactor(ui): migrate tags table onto shared DataTable by @yuneng-berri in #33314
  • fix(cli): surface actionable CLI SSO errors when CLI and proxy versions skew by @ryan-crabbe-berri in #33309
  • feat(bedrock_mantle): add GPT-5.6 sol/terra/luna to model cost map by @mateo-berri in #33412
  • chore(codeowners): exempt generated schema.d.ts from UI ownership by @yuneng-berri in #33411
  • feat(proxy): push-based OTLP billable-request metering for enterprise deployments by @yassin-berriai in #31592
  • fix(mcp): cap per-user OAuth token cache TTL at the token's own lifetime by @tin-berri in #33346
  • feat(ui): move Caching out of Experimental into Developer Tools by @devin-ai-integration[bot] in #33432
  • chore(ci): promote internal staging to main by @yuneng-berri in #33425
  • chore(ci): merge daily internal staging branch by @yuneng-berri in #33335
  • feat(guardrails): add Compresr guardrail for query-aware context compression by @yucheng-berri in #33295
  • fix(logging): preserve callback order in get_combined_callback_list by @devin-ai-integration[bot] in #33005
  • fix(logging): redact assistant tool call arguments in spend logs by @devin-ai-integration[bot] in #33111
  • fix(anthropic): honor messages request timeout by @yucheng-berri in #33418
  • fix(llm_guard): apply sanitized prompt returned by moderation API to request by @devin-ai-integration[bot] in #33331
  • fix(logging): stop pinning large request payloads past request end by @yassin-berriai in #33455
  • feat(guardrails): forward optional metadata on POST /guardrails/apply_guardrail by @devin-ai-integration[bot] in #33067
  • build: raise requires-python cap to <3.15 so Python 3.14 installs current releases by @ryan-crabbe-berri in #33438
  • feat(ui): add reusable BetaBadge and use it for Projects sidebar item by @devin-ai-integration[bot] in #33449
  • fix(mcp): discover missing OAuth scopes and token_url when authorization_url is set manually by @tin-berri in #33317
  • feat(ui): show exact license expiration date in usage cards by @yuneng-berri in #33478
  • test(claude_code): rename misleading REPO_ROOT to SUITE_ROOT in test_v0_layout by @mateo-berri in #33472
  • build(deps): update ddtrace to the 4.x line by @yuneng-berri in #33484
  • fix(complexity_router): return empty dict from _classifier_call_metadata when metadata is absent by @devin-ai-integration[bot] in #33452
  • fix(ui/chat): resolve chat routes at render time so navigation works under server_root_path by @yuneng-berri in #33446
  • fix(key management): enforce minimum custom key length and mask short keys in key_name by @yucheng-berri in #33462
  • chore(ui): remove unmounted UsageIndicator and the Hide Usage Indicator flag by @yuneng-berri in #33482
  • test(e2e/claude_code): add passthrough matrix row for the big-3 clouds and Anthropic API by @mateo-berri in #33473
  • chore(ci): promote internal staging to main by @yuneng-berri in #33491

Full Changelog: v1.94.0-dev.1...v1.94.0-dev.2

entry.title: crowdstrike-falcon-foundry
entry.content: CrowdStrike Falcon Foundry development skills for building cybersecurity applications on the Falcon platform. Includes UI development, collections, functions, workflows, API integration, security patterns, and debugging workflows. Swagger 2.0 specs are auto-converted to OpenAPI 3.0 via npx swagger2openapi (requires Node.js; network call to npm registry).

entry.title: octo
entry.content: v9.52.0 - Reliability wave: tangle contextual review correction loop with hard round ceiling, progress-supervised review rounds (per-agent stall watch, descendant-tree kills), council diversity and agy pin fixes, marketplace generator source-of-truth fix, provider troubleshooting runbook and cost-expectations docs. Run /octo:setup.

entry.content: Ultra-compressed communication mode. Cuts 65% of output tokens (measured) while keeping full technical accuracy by speaking like a caveman.

entry.content: Scaffold, develop, evaluate, and deploy AI agents with Google ADK. Bundles 7 skills for the agent development lifecycle.

entry.title: freee-api

entry.title: novel-studio
entry.content: AI 웹소설 창작 하네스. 18개 전문 에이전트와 10개 스킬로 기획→설계→집필→윤문→재작성 전 과정을 자동화. Web novel creation harness with end-to-end automation from planning to publishing.

entry.title: context-mode
entry.content: Claude Code MCP plugin that saves 98% of your context window. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and intent-driven search.

entry.title: memorybank
entry.content: Structured, drift-checked memory records for AI agents: decisions, conventions, facts, features, and deferred work — with CI-verifiable assertions that fail the build when memory and code diverge.

entry.title: career-ops
entry.content: Job search copilot for any industry. Evaluate job postings, generate ATS-optimized resumes, scan career portals, track applications, draft outreach, and research companies. Works for engineers, marketers, nurses, lawyers, and everyone in between.

entry.title: remember
entry.content: Continuous memory for Claude Code. Extracts, summarizes, and compresses conversations into tiered daily logs. Claude remembers what you did yesterday.

entry.title: planning-with-files
entry.content: Manus-style persistent markdown files for planning, progress tracking, and knowledge storage. Works with Claude Code, Kiro, Clawd CLI, Gemini CLI, Cursor, Continue, Hermes, and 17+ AI coding assistants. Now with Arabic, German, Spanish, and Chinese (Simplified & Traditional) support.

entry.content: Give your AI a memory — mine projects and conversations into a searchable palace. 19 MCP tools, auto-save hooks, and guided setup.

entry.title: octo
entry.content: Multi-tentacled orchestrator using Double Diamond methodology. (v9.7.8) Windows USER fix, Codex smoke test git repo fix. 3-tier adaptive statusline, smart HUD. 32 expert personas, 47 commands, 45 skills. Commands use '/octo:*', including the '/octo:auto' smart router. Run /octo:setup for guided setup.

entry.title: open-prose
entry.content: A programming language for AI sessions - structures English into unambiguous control flow for multi-agent orchestration

entry.title: next-supabase-agent-harness
entry.content: Subagents, commands, and the vertical-slice skill from the next-supabase-agent-harness. The deterministic layer (hooks, gates, permissions, CI) cannot ship in a plugin — install it with: npx --yes github:BhodiSea/next-supabase-agent-harness init

entry.title: webgpu-threejs-tsl
entry.content: Claude skill for WebGPU-enabled Three.js development with TSL (Three.js Shading Language)

entry.title: sentry
entry.content: Sentry Plugin for Claude Code to help with debugging including MCP and skill capabilities.

entry.title: migration-to-aws
entry.content: This no-cost tool assesses your current cloud provider's usage, geography, and billing data to estimate and compare AWS services and pricing, and recommends migration or continued use of your current provider. Supports GCP and Heroku migrations. AWS pricing is based on current published pricing and may vary over time. The tool may generate a .migration folder containing comparison and migration execution data, which you may delete upon completion or use to migrate to AWS.

entry.content: Skills for working with Langfuse, the open-source LLM engineering platform for tracing, prompt management, and evaluation.

entry.title: hunter
entry.content: Find and verify professional email addresses, search contacts by domain, and enrich company data -- directly in Claude.

entry.title: vpai
entry.content: Power your chat with B2B data to create lead lists, research companies, personalize your outreach, and more. Search any company or professional to access emails, phone numbers, roles, growth signals, tech stack details, business events, website changes, and more.

entry.title: pinecone
entry.content: Pinecone vector database integration. Streamline your Pinecone development with powerful tools for managing vector indexes, querying data, and rapid prototyping. Use slash commands like /quickstart to generate AGENTS.md files and initialize Python projects and /query to quickly explore indexes. Access the Pinecone MCP server for creating, describing, upserting and querying indexes with Claude. Perfect for developers building semantic search, RAG applications, recommendation systems, and other vector-based applications with Pinecone.

entry.title: sentry
entry.content: Sentry error monitoring integration. Access error reports, analyze stack traces, search issues by fingerprint, and debug production errors directly from your development environment.

entry.title: exa
entry.content: Exa AI web search, deep research, and content extraction. Provides MCP tools and research skills for comprehensive web search, people discovery, company research, academic papers, and more.

entry.content: edmunds-claude-code — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: superpowers

entry.title: taste-skill
entry.content: Frontend design taste skills including brutalist, minimalist, soft, redesign, stitch, and more

entry.title: beads
entry.content: AI-supervised issue tracker for coding workflows. Manage tasks, discover work, and maintain context with simple CLI commands.

entry.title: prompt-to-code
entry.content: Compile the rules governing your coding agent (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, chat history) into deterministic enforcement in your project's native toolchain — lint rules, pre-commit, slash commands — each with a native test.

entry.title: godmode
entry.content: IDDQD for your ideas — 켜면 문서가 '완성'이라고 말할 때까지 안 멈추는 골 드리븐 파이프라인 루프. Turn it on. It refuses to die until it's done.

entry.title: box-rclone-binder
entry.content: Bind one Box drive across multiple servers via rclone with non-expiring server auth; idempotent deploy, health-check self-heal, cron, and Discord alerts.

entry.title: swe
entry.content: State-machine workflow engine with Serena memory persistence, hook-driven event architecture, and optional swarm orchestration

entry.title: spec-dev
entry.content: Development workflow plugin suite: exploring (thinking partner), requirement-analysis (design workflow), writing-plans / executing-plans (planning and execution), visual-preview, using-git-worktrees / test-driven-development (engineering discipline), acceptance-qa (all-round acceptance), quick-fix (lightweight bug-fix workflow), anysearch (bundled real-time search, vendored from upstream). / 开发工作流插件集：exploring 探索模式、requirement-analysis 设计工作流、writing-plans/executing-plans 计划与执行、visual-preview 可视化预览、using-git-worktrees/test-driven-development 工程纪律、acceptance-qa 全能验收、quick-fix 轻量修复、anysearch 内置实时搜索（上游 skill 内嵌）。

entry.content: Vite build setup, SCSS architecture, Bootstrap theming for TYPO3 v13+

entry.content: Fetch up-to-date library documentation via Context7 REST API

entry.title: cmux
entry.content: Claude Code integration for the cmux terminal multiplexer — workspace management, pane splitting, notifications, sidebar status, browser automation, and multi-agent orchestration

entry.title: pagerangers-seo
entry.content: PageRangers SEO API integration for AI assistants

entry.title: file-search
entry.content: Fast codebase search with ripgrep for text patterns, ast-grep for structural code search, plus fd, rga, tokei, and scc

entry.title: better-notion-mcp
entry.content: Markdown-first Notion API integration — 8 composite tools, ~95% coverage

entry.title: matomo-analytics
entry.content: Unofficial community plugin for Matomo Analytics. Query visits, page views, events, search keywords, traffic sources, and AI assistant referrals directly from Claude.

entry.title: navigator
entry.content: Finish What You Start - Sessions that last, AI that learns, Features that ship. Context engineering + Theory of Mind + Knowledge Graph + Loop Mode + Task Mode. Features Project Knowledge Graph (unified search, experiential memory), unified workflow orchestration, auto-update on session start, ToM-based verification checkpoints, bilateral modeling, quality detection, enhanced context markers, and Loop Mode. 92% token reduction with proven strategies. Based on Riedl & Weidmann 2025 Human-AI Synergy research.

entry.title: dx
entry.content: Developer experience essentials: GitHub Actions debugging, conversation half-cloning, context handoffs, research (Reddit and Hacker News), private GitHub search, and Claude Code version checks

entry.title: mangrove-trader
entry.content: Social trading leaderboard. Track trades via @MangroveTrader on Twitter, check stats and performance for free, access rankings and trader search via x402 micropayments (USDC on Base).

entry.title: shipyard
entry.content: Shared development tools for Submariner repositories

entry.title: lux-dev
entry.content: Visual output surface for Claude Code: display text, images, tables, plots, and interactive elements

entry.content: Connect MultiversX to Claude, Codex, and ChatGPT. Check balances, view transactions, manage staking, and interact with ESDT tokens through natural language.

entry.title: data-tools
entry.content: Structured data manipulation with jq, yq, dasel, qsv, and mlr for JSON, JSONL, YAML, TOML, XML, and CSV processing

entry.title: react-native-storybook
entry.content: Create and edit React Native Storybook stories using Component Story Format (CSF). Includes controls reference, addon configuration, and portable story patterns.

entry.title: agent-skills
entry.content: Domain-specific skills and agents for Odoo development, code review, and more

entry.title: github-release
entry.content: Safe, automated GitHub releases with supply chain security. Prevents dangerous gh release commands, orchestrates version bumps, signed tags, and CI-driven releases across ecosystems (TYPO3, PHP, Node.js, Go, Python, Rust, skill repos).

entry.title: claude-coverwise
entry.content: Pairwise / t-wise combinatorial coverage checker for AI-written tests. Wraps the coverwise WASM engine as an MCP server plus a skill that teaches the constraint DSL.

entry.title: agent-messenger
entry.content: Messaging platform interaction skills for AI agents. Interact with Slack, Discord, Microsoft Teams, Webex, Telegram, Telegram Bot, WhatsApp, LINE, iMessage, Instagram, KakaoTalk, and Channel Talk - send messages, read channels, manage reactions, upload files, and more through simple CLI interfaces.

entry.title: claude-bughunter
entry.content: 71-skill bug-hunting & external red-team bundle for Claude Code — 48 hunt-* web/vuln-class + framework skills, enterprise platform attack chains (M365/Entra, Okta, SharePoint, vCenter, SSL-VPN, APK), recon/OSINT, reporting & validation gates, and Burp MCP integration. Skills auto-load by topic; 15 slash commands included.

entry.title: claude-dashboard
entry.content: Comprehensive status line with context usage, API rate limits, and cost tracking

entry.title: impeccable
entry.content: Design vocabulary and skills for frontend development. Includes 21 commands (/polish, /distill, /audit, /typeset, /overdrive, etc.) and an enhanced impeccable skill with curated anti-patterns.

entry.title: pi-skill
entry.content: Code-grounded Agent Skills for building with Pi (pi-mono). Covers all 7 packages: pi coding agent (workspace, extensions, packages, RPC/SDK, customization), pi-ai (multi-provider LLM API), pi-agent-core (agent runtime), pi-tui (terminal UI), pi-web-ui (web components), pi-mom (Slack bot), and pi-pods (vLLM GPU deployments). Skills are grounded in the pi-mono source corpus and cite real file paths.

entry.title: ida-pro
entry.content: AI-powered reverse engineering assistant that bridges IDA Pro with language models through MCP.

entry.title: vbw
entry.content: Vibe Better With Claude Code - You're not an engineer anymore. You're a prompt jockey with commit access. At least do it properly.

entry.content: Complete developer toolkit for Claude Code

entry.title: caveman
entry.content: Ultra-compressed communication mode. Cuts 65% of output tokens (measured) while keeping full technical accuracy by speaking like a caveman.

entry.title: obsidian
entry.content: Create and edit Obsidian vault files including Markdown, Bases, and Canvas. Use when working with .md, .base, or .canvas files in an Obsidian vault.

entry.title: academic-research-skills
entry.content: Production-grade academic research pipeline for Claude Code: research → write → review → revise → finalize. 4 skills, 35+ modes, 38-agent ensemble, v3.7.3 + v3.8 L3 claim-faithfulness gate, v3.9.0 cross-index triangulation, v3.9.2 phase boundary fence (#133).

entry.title: claudeclaw
entry.content: Cron-like daemon that runs Claude prompts on a schedule

entry.title: martti-mode
entry.content: Finnish-style brevity for Claude Code. Cuts output tokens by responding like a quiet Finn — no small talk, no filler, asia edellä.

entry.title: sonarqube
entry.content: SonarQube is the AI code quality and security verification platform used by millions of developers to catch bugs, vulnerabilities, and leaked secrets. This plugin enforces those standards in the agent coding loop: 7,500+ distinct issue types, secrets scanning, agentic analysis, and quality gates across 40+ languages.

entry.title: chrome-bookmarks-mcp
entry.content: Manage Chrome's synced bookmarks from Claude — list, search, add, move, rename, dedupe, and reorganize folders. Edits go through chrome.bookmarks via a companion extension, so they sync durably.

entry.title: context-mode

entry.title: browser-harness
entry.content: Direct browser control via CDP. Drives the user's real Chrome (or a Browser Use cloud browser) with coordinate clicks, screenshots, and Python helpers — no selector hunting. Requires the one-time `browser-harness` CLI install (see the skill's references/install.md).

entry.title: marketing-skills
entry.content: Marketing skills for AI agents — conversion optimization, copywriting, SEO, paid ads, ad creative, and growth

entry.title: superpowers
entry.content: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques

entry.title: learn-with-coursera
entry.content: Turn any learning intent into a personalized Coursera experience. Asks three quick questions (topic, familiarity, preferred format), searches Coursera's catalog, and delivers the right next step — a course, hands-on project, short video, or live roleplay — then maps a path forward. Requires the Coursera connector for catalog tools.

entry.title: renoise
entry.content: AI video production skills — creative direction, generation, editing, and e-commerce content

entry.title: tkm
entry.content: Claude Code Pokémon gamification plugin with token-to-XP progression, party growth, and a Braille-first status line

entry.title: beads
entry.content: AI-supervised issue tracker for coding workflows. Manage tasks, discover work, and maintain context with simple CLI commands.

entry.title: preview-build
entry.content: Build and capture SwiftUI previews for visual analysis. Supports Xcode projects, SPM packages, and standalone Swift files.

entry.title: qdrant
entry.content: Agent skills for Qdrant vector search: scaling, performance optimization, search quality, monitoring, deployment, edge, model migration, version upgrades, and SDK usage

entry.title: auth0
entry.content: A single unified Auth0 skill that detects your framework, feature, and tooling, then loads the right reference guides for adding authentication — login, MFA, Organizations, ACUL, custom domains, branding, JWT validation, migration, and debugging — to any app.

entry.content: JavaScript and TypeScript development with ES6+, Node.js, React, and modern web frameworks

entry.title: seo-analysis-monitoring
entry.content: Content freshness analysis, cannibalization detection, and authority building for SEO

entry.title: green-keeper
entry.content: Keeps your tests and types green while you code — fixes red with minimal changes, maintains behavioral tests, and won't let you walk away from red. No fake-green.

entry.title: reverse-engineering
entry.content: Binary reverse engineering, malware analysis, firmware security, and software protection research for authorized security research, CTF competitions, and defensive security

entry.content: Cross-platform application development coordinating web, iOS, Android, and desktop implementations
